nodes.label: For substring length L = 2 to n
For start index i = 1 to n-L+1
For split point k = i to j-1
For each rule A → B C

If B ∈ table[i][k] AND
C ∈ table[k+1][j]

visuals.title: CYK Algorithm Flowchart
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">CYK Parsing Algorithm</text>
  
  <!-- Input String -->
  <rect x="110" y="50" width="200" height="30" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input String: "a a b b"
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Grammar Rules -->
  <rect x="50" y="100" width="120" height="100" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Grammar Rules
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    S → AB | BC
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A → BA | a
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B → CC | b
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="110" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C → AB | a
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Parsing Table -->
  <rect x="250" y="100" width="120" height="100" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parsing Table
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Dynamic Programming
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Bottom-up Approach
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cell[i,j] = Non-terminals
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    that generate substring
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Algorithm Flow -->
  <rect x="150" y="220" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Check if S ∈ Table[1,n]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Result -->
  <rect x="150" y="280" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    String is in Language
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
